title: Why keys matter in lists
author: M-1001
body: React uses keys to match old and new children during reconciliation. Index keys break when the list reorders.

title: Stale closures in useEffect
author: M-1003
body: An effect captures the props/state from the render it was created in. Missing deps means reading old values forever.

title: Controlled vs uncontrolled forms
author: M-1002
body: Controlled inputs keep the value in React state; uncontrolled inputs keep it in the DOM and are read via refs.

title: When useMemo actually helps
author: M-1005
body: Memoization is a trade: it costs memory and comparison time. Use it for expensive computations or referential stability.

title: Lifting state up
author: M-1006
body: When two siblings need the same data, move the state to their closest common parent and pass it down as props.

title: Error boundaries only catch renders
author: M-1008
body: Event handlers, async code and SSR errors are NOT caught by error boundaries. Use try/catch there instead.
